claims.summary: Linguistic contract presence alone does not prove a smaller fallback model preserves lived texture.

claims.summary: Pressure and density gradient should jointly shape fallback vocabulary instead of being treated as one scalar.

claims.summary: The requested low-gradient laminar and high-gradient friction mapping exists in later structured source.
